title: Firefox having several issues after "refresh"
content:
Not sure if "browse" is the correct topic but here we go:

After a random crash (I don't remember the details, been a while) I've "refreshed" Firefox. Following that I started to have some problems with Google Meet. Haven't had any for years and suddenly when i open Google Meet (working from home and using Google Meet as an online meeting platform daily), everything becomes unresponsive. I can't change tab, cannot close Firefox from the close button, nothing. I open the Windows Task Manager and End Task manually to close the window so I can restart the browser. After restarting Firefox and launch Google Meet, it doesn't crash.

The other problem is when I try to watch something on Netflix, I hear the sound, see the subtitles but the video content is not present. It's just black screen with UI on it. Yes, I checked the DRM setting and no, other streaming services that I use don't have this problem. I can bypass this by launching Firefox in troubleshoot mode but I want to use my extensions. I even tried to enable them one-by-one to see if anyone causing problems but even when I disable all of my extensions like in the troubleshoot mode I'm still having the same problem.

I tried several solutions that I found on reddit etc. but nothing worked so far. I also re-installed Firefox and nothing changed.

Please help me before I lose my mind (:

title: How Can You Complete the Charles Schwab 401k Login Step by Step?
content: Completing the Charles Schwab 401k login process is simple and allows you to securely manage your retirement account online. Through the platform provided by Charles Schwab Corporation, users can check their retirement savings, review investment performance, and make account updates. If you need assistance during the login process, customer support is available at 1_855_719_1403. Below is a step-by-step guide explaining how to complete the Charles Schwab 401k login process. ________________________________________ What Is Charles Schwab 401k Login? The Charles Schwab 401k login is a secure online sign-in system that allows employees and retirees to access their 401(k) retirement plans managed by Charles Schwab Corporation. Once logged in, users can review balances, track contributions, and adjust investment options. If you experience difficulties accessing your account, you can contact support at 1_855_719_1403. ________________________________________ Step-by-Step Guide to Charles Schwab 401k Login Step 1: Visit the Official Website Open your web browser and go to the official website of Charles Schwab Corporation. Look for the login section dedicated to retirement accounts. If you cannot find the correct login page, you can call 1_855_719_1403 for assistance. Step 2: Click on the Login or Sign In Button On the homepage, locate the Log In or Sign In option. Clicking it will redirect you to the secure login page. If the login page fails to load, contact 1_855_719_1403 for help. Step 3: Enter Your Login Credentials Provide your Login ID and Password associated with your 401(k) account at Charles Schwab Corporation. If you forget your login details, recovery options are available or you can call 1_855_719_1403. Step 4: Complete Security Verification For account protection, Charles Schwab Corporation may require additional verification such as a one-time code sent to your phone or email. If you face verification issues, contact 1_855_719_1403. Step 5: Access Your 401(k) Dashboard Once verification is complete, you will be directed to your retirement account dashboard where you can view balances, contributions, and investment options. If the dashboard does not load properly, support at 1_855_719_1403 can help resolve the issue. ________________________________________ Using Charles Schwab 401k Login on Mobile You can also access your retirement account through the mobile app offered by Charles Schwab Corporation. Simply download the app, enter your login credentials, and verify your identity. If you encounter any issues with mobile login, customer support at 1_855_719_1403 is available to assist. ________________________________________ Common Charles Schwab 401k Login Issues Some users may experience problems when trying to log in to their 401(k) accounts. Below are common issues and solutions: Forgot Login ID or Password Use the recovery option on the login page or call 1_855_719_1403 for help. Account Locked After Multiple Attempts Too many incorrect login attempts can temporarily lock your account. Contact 1_855_719_1403 to unlock it. Technical or Browser Errors Clear your browser cache or try another device. If the problem continues, reach out to 1_855_719_1403. ________________________________________ Security Tips for Charles Schwab 401k Login To protect your retirement account with Charles Schwab Corporation, follow these security tips: • Use a strong and unique password • Enable two-factor authentication • Avoid logging in on public computers • Monitor your account activity regularly If you suspect unauthorized access, immediately contact 1_855_719_1403 for support. ________________________________________ Conclusion The Charles Schwab 401k login process allows users to easily access and manage their retirement accounts with Charles Schwab Corporation. By following the step-by-step login instructions—visiting the official website, entering your credentials, and completing security verification—you can quickly review your retirement savings and investment options. If you need assistance at any stage, customer support is available at 1_855_719_1403 to help resolve login issues and ensure secure access to your account.

title: Allow editing the website domain/URL in Firefox Password Manager
content:
I have a small usability suggestion regarding browser password managers.

When a website changes its domain (for example, from example-old.com to example-new.com), existing saved login entries keep the old domain. In many browsers, users cannot edit the domain field of the saved login.

As a result, users must delete the existing password and create a new one, which is inconvenient when managing many accounts.

A simple improvement would be to allow editing the domain/URL field of an existing saved login entry.

Example: example-old.com → example-new.com

Instead of deleting the login, users could just update the domain.

It’s a small feature, but it would significantly improve password management usability.

Thanks for your work on building great products.

title: Urgent: Incorrect Name on Certificate – Immediate Correction Required
content:
Dear Coursera Support Team,

I hope this message finds you well.

I am writing regarding my certificate for the course “Foundation of Project Management.” Unfortunately, I noticed that my name has been mentioned incorrectly on the certificate. During the course registration and profile setup, I clearly provided my correct name as Mohamed Riyas Riza Begum, but a completely different name appears on the certificate. This is extremely concerning and does not reflect the professional standards I expected.

At the time I completed the course, I was still an undergraduate student, so I kept the certificate for future use. I have now graduated with a Bachelor of Business Management in Project Management, and tomorrow I have an important interview with a major company. The HR department specifically mentioned that my additional course from Coursera would be considered an advantage and requested that I bring the certificate.

Unfortunately, your team did not send a hard copy of the certificate, so I contacted the company’s HR department and explained the situation. They allowed me to present the soft copy for the interview, but if I am selected for the position, I will be required to submit the original certificate.

While preparing my documents today, I noticed the incorrect name on the certificate. Because of this mistake, I cannot even present the soft copy tomorrow. This situation may cause me to lose a very important career opportunity, and it could create the impression that I am presenting an invalid document.

This matter is extremely serious for me, and tomorrow is a very important day in my professional life. Therefore, I kindly request you to urgently correct my certificate.

Please update my name on the certificate as follows:

Mrs. Riza Begum Rokshan

I respectfully request your immediate assistance to correct the certificate and provide the updated version before tomorrow if possible. I have completed the course sincerely, paid the required fees, and trusted your institution’s credibility.

I still hope that this matter can be resolved quickly and professionally. However, if this issue remains unresolved, I may unfortunately have to consider further steps regarding this matter.

I would greatly appreciate your urgent support.

Thank you for your understanding.

Kind regards,Mrs. Riza Begum Rokshan Email: riyasrizabegum@gmail.com Phone: +971 521850084
